original_prompt: 给这个手串做一张淘宝主图，要求深色背景的高级礼盒面板，主文案：透光如星 驱散浊气  副文案：平安顺遂 白水晶
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
"Modern E-commerce [Jewelry & Accessories] scene, [High-End Luxury] commercial photography style. [A minimalist, high-clarity spherical bead bracelet arranged in a continuous circular loop, consisting of approximately 14-16 identical, perfectly round Clear Quartz spheres strung together on a central, visible elastic cord. Each bead acts as a fisheye lens that refracts light, creating distinct specular highlights] located in the [Center].
[Props]: Resting on a premium deep-colored velvet jewelry gift box cushion, surrounded by subtle starburst lighting effects.
[Background]: Dark, elegant studio background with deep navy or charcoal tones to emphasize crystal clarity.
Lighting is [Focused Spot Lighting], highlighting the transparency and internal reflections of the beads, making them glow like stars against the dark backdrop."

[Text & UI Layout]
"***Layout Style**: Top-Bottom Standard.
Text Rendering Instructions (Must be High Contrast & Legible):
1. **Main Title**: Content: “透光如星 驱散浊气”. Position: [Top Center/Left]. Style: [Elegant Serif Font, White with outer glow]. Color: [White/Silver].
2. **Sub Title**: Content: “平安顺遂 白水晶”. Style: [Clean Sans-serif, slightly smaller].
3. **Marketing Banner**: Content: “天然甄选”. Style: [Minimalist Gold Line Border].
4. **Trust Badge**: Content: “权威鉴定”. Style: [Translucent Shield Badge]."
layout_logic: 采用暗调背景（Dark Mode）策略，利用深色丝绒礼盒作为底托，最大化凸显白水晶的高折射率和通透感。文字部分应置于顶部较暗的区域，使用白色或银色字体，形成强烈的黑白对比，确保在移动端小屏上也能瞬间识别‘透光如星’的核心卖点。
